title: Polymarket research: Will Trump nominate Stephen Miran as the next Fed chair?

web_results.title: Stephen Miran - Wikipedia
web_results.description: In December 2024, President Donald Trump nominated Miran for chair of the Council of Economic Advisers. He was confirmed by the United States Senate in March 2025. Miran developed the Trump administration's tariff policy, opining that import taxes are not inflationary.

web_results.title: Trump-appointed Fed Governor Stephen Miran resigns from White House post
web_results.description: Miran’s resignation comes as Trump continues to reshape the Federal Reserve. On Friday, the president nominated Kevin Warsh to succeed Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell amid a criminal investigation.

web_results.title: Stephen Miran resigns from the White House, keeping his seat at the Fed | CNN Business
web_results.description: But Miran’s continued service in that spot marks an opportunity for Trump. The president has nominated Kevin Warsh to become the new Fed chair once Jerome Powell’s term leading the central bank expires in May.

web_results.title: Federal Reserve governor Miran steps down from White House post | AP News
web_results.description: “In accordance with the pledge he made to the Senate during his confirmation to the Federal Reserve’s Board of Governors, Stephen Miran has submitted his resignation from the Council of Economic Advisers,” Desai said.

web_results.title: Trump adviser Stephen Miran quits White House role to stay on at Fed | Trump administration | The Guardian
web_results.description: Miran said he had been legally advised there was no need to quit his CEA post as the Fed job was only for a few months. Trump nominates Federal Reserve critic Kevin Warsh as its next chair

news_results.title: Trump adviser Stephen Miran quits White House role to stay on at Fed | Trump administration | The Guardian
news_results.description: Miran, set to continue as Federal Reserve governor until Jerome Powell successor is confirmed, to leave CEA post

news_results.title: Who has to leave the Federal Reserve next? | Brookings
news_results.description: David Wessel discuss upcoming turnovers at the Federal Reserve board and banks.

news_results.title: Fed's Stephen Miran resigns as top White House economist
news_results.description: Federal Reserve Gov. Stephen Miran has resigned as chair of the Council of Economic Advisers, the White House confirmed Tuesday. Miran had been on unpaid leave from the White House since last fall,…

news_results.title: Trump-appointed Fed Governor Stephen Miran resigns from White House post
news_results.description: Federal Reserve Governor Stephen Miran resigned from his CEA chair role to focus full-time on his Fed position, as required by federal law and regulations.

news_results.title: Fed Governor Miran quits White House job | Reuters
news_results.description: Federal Reserve Governor Stephen Miran resigned on Tuesday from his position as chair of the White House's Council of Economic Advisers, fulfilling a pledge he made to the Senate as his assignment at the central bank becomes longer-lasting.

result.query: Will Trump nominate Stephen Miran as the next Fed chair?
